name: Ikoula
notes:
Pioneer of the French Cloud since 1998, IKOULA owns its own Datacenters in France (Reims and Eppes)

Because Human Being is part of its DNA, IKOULA maintains a close relationship with its customers, and puts at their disposal reactive teams of experts, available 24/7, able to advise them and accompany them in their activities. 
IKOULA's teams are multilingual, in order to meet the internationalization challenges of all its customers, spread over more than 60 countries on 4 continents.

https://www.ikoula.com/en/
